title: atriplex hastata subsp. patula
intro: Atriplex hastata subsp. patula, also known as prairie saltbush or inland sea-purslane, is a succulent shrub native to North America, characterized by its green or purple stems and small, white flowers. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Atriplex hastata subsp. patula include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
